title: triangular-prism complex floating stack · base stack v4 floating
meta: sparse stack using source base geometry: triangular_prism

qa_seeds.question: How many triangular prisms are in the stack?
qa_seeds.evidence: Sum all nonzero column heights and any explicitly floating solids.

qa_seeds.question: What is the maximum number of base solids in one vertical position?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count stacked and floating solids at each vertical grid position.

qa_seeds.question: How many vertical positions reach the highest occupied layer?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count positions whose highest occupied layer equals the scene maximum.

qa_seeds.question: What is the highest occupied layer number if the ground layer is layer 1?
qa_seeds.evidence: Find the largest occupied layer index and convert it to one-based numbering.

qa_seeds.question: How many ground positions are occupied by at least one base solid?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count nonzero cells in the ground height map.

qa_seeds.question: How many base solids are in the marked vertical position P?
qa_seeds.evidence: The orange dashed line and P label mark the selected column.

qa_seeds.question: How many occupied vertical positions contain at least two base solids?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count vertical positions with two or more occupied layers.

qa_seeds.question: How many ground positions are empty?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count cells in the sparse height map with height zero.

qa_seeds.question: How many base solids are above the first layer?
qa_seeds.evidence: For each column, count all layers above the ground layer.

qa_seeds.question: How many vertical positions have a solid on the third layer or higher?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count positions whose highest occupied layer is at least the third layer.

qa_seeds.question: How many base solids are floating above a gap or empty cell?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count solids listed in the nonphysical floating layer set.

qa_seeds.question: How many grid positions contain at least one floating solid?
qa_seeds.evidence: Count distinct grid positions used by floating solids.

qa_seeds.question: What is the highest layer number occupied by a floating solid?
qa_seeds.evidence: Find the maximum floating layer index and convert it to one-based numbering.
